summary.en: Headless chat window: MVVM command surface for opening a thread with a contact (e.g. supplier primary contact) and sending messages. GUI binds the same commands as tests (no real click events required).
summary.zh_CN: 无头聊天窗口：MVVM 命令面，用于与联系人（如供应商主联系人）打开会话并发送消息；界面与测试绑定同一套命令，无需真实点击事件。

scenarios.title: Open chat with supplier contact
scenarios.description: In supply chain management, a user opens a chat window with the supplier's primary contact to coordinate delivery or quality issues.
preconditions: Supplier record references primaryContactId resolved via contact.get.

scenarios.title: Automated tests call command handlers directly
scenarios.description: View code maps foo.onclick to foo_command(); conformance tests invoke the same command payload as the view model without emitting GUI events.
